_doc: L12 Discoverability harness — copy these 5 hook entries into your project's .claude/settings.json under hooks. Adjust paths if you put hooks somewhere other than .claude/hooks/.
_install_steps: 3. Ensure discoverability.config.yaml is at <project-root>/discoverability.config.yaml (otherwise all hooks silent-exit)

_path_form_options.form_b_absolute_node_exe: "C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" "<absolute>/<hook>.js" — Windows-style absolute path with node.exe; use when Node is not in PATH
_path_form_options.form_c_node_in_path: node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/<hook>.js" — when 'node' is on PATH (mac/linux/Windows with node in PATH)

SessionStart._comment: disc-session-context — advisory; emits L12 status reminder at session start. Never blocks. Silent exit on non-L12 projects.

PreToolUse._comment: disc-robots-sitemap-guard — blocks obvious robots/sitemap/llms.txt mistakes (full-site Disallow without sentinel, private routes in sitemap, etc.). Exit 2 to block.
disc-deploy-gate — blocks deploy commands (vercel/netlify/wrangler/firebase/pnpm-release/gsd-ship/...) when gate is STALE/FAIL/BLOCKED/missing/stale-by-time. Exit 2 to block.

PostToolUse._comment: disc-mark-stale — flips .discoverability/state.json gate_status to STALE when a discoverability-relevant file (robots/sitemap/metadata/structured-data/store-listing) is edited. Cannot block (PostToolUse).

Stop._comment: disc-evidence-required — when the assistant claims 'discoverability done / L12 complete / SEO/AEO/ASO audit done / 可发现性审查通过' but gate-result.yaml is missing/FAIL/BLOCKED/STALE, emit Stop block. 30s timeout because Stop hooks can take longer to evaluate state.

_disabling_per_hook: To disable an individual hook without removing it from settings, set the matching key in discoverability.config.yaml: harness.hook_modes.<name> = 'off'. Names: session_context, mark_stale, robots_sitemap_guard, deploy_gate, evidence_required.
_disabling_all_hooks: Set harness.enabled = false in discoverability.config.yaml. All 5 hooks will silent-exit.
_strict_vs_warn: harness.strict_mode = true (default) → blocking hooks block. harness.strict_mode = false → all hooks downgrade to stderr advisory + exit 0 (still emit warnings).
